  uid=8_35 StaticText "Rent Special available! One or two months free! Sign a 12-month lease and get 1 month free, or choose an 18-month lease and get 2 months free, plus up to $4,000 in BPI Equity credit—helping you save today and build equity for tomorrow. Terms apply."

  uid=8_42 StaticText "BLUESKY Chinatown

BLUESKY offers accessibility to many of the city’s most celebrated restaurants, bars, shops, and services, all within walking distance. At the foot of the building is Dalina Café, a local shop offering coffee, food options and specialty grocery items to take home. Residents can also enjoy a 2,000 sq foot rooftop terrace, a lounge, fitness studio and even a workshop.

All of our buildings are designed, built and cared for by Bosa Properties. Renting with us gives you access to all BPI rental benefits, designed to make your experience effortless and convenient.

BPI Equity

The first program of its kind, created to help you own a home.

With BPI Equity, up to 25% of the monthly rent you pay is automatically saved towards the future purchase of a new Bosa Properties Home."

  uid=8_187 StaticText "BLUESKY Chinatown 183 Georgia St E, Vancouver, BC is a rental apartment building with 21 floorplans available. It is located in the Strathcona neighborhood of Vancouver. It has apartment amenities including in-unit laundry, balcony, on-site laundry, and dishwasher. It has building amenities including fitness center, on-site laundry, outdoor space, controlled access, storage, on-site management, elevator, and garage parking. Cats and dogs are allowed, making it a pet-friendly building."
